#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;

long long solve(vector<long long> nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    if (n < 4) return 0; // according to problem statement, there is at least one valid subarray, but the input is guaranteed to have at least one.

    // Compute left_incr
    vector<int> left_incr(n, 1);
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (nums[i] > nums[i-1]) {
            left_incr[i] = left_incr[i-1] + 1;
        } else {
            left_incr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute right_decr
    vector<int> right_decr(n, 1);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
        if (nums[i] > nums[i+1]) {
            right_decr[i] = right_decr[i+1] + 1;
        } else {
            right_decr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute right_incr
    vector<int> right_incr(n, 1);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {

using namespace std;

long long solve(vector<long long> nums) {
    int n = nums.size();

    // Compute left_incr

            left_incr[i] = left_incr[i-1] + 1;
        } else {
            left_incr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute right_decr
    vector<int> right_decr(n, 1);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
        if (nums[i] > nums[i+1]) {
            right_decr[i] = right_decr[i+1] + 1;
        } else {
            right_decr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute right_incr
    vector<int> right_incr(n, 1);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
        if (nums[i] < nums[i+1]) {
            right_incr[i] = right_incr[i+1] + 1;
        } else {
            right_incr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute prefix sums
    vector<long long> prefix(n);
    prefix[0] = nums[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        prefix[i] = prefix[i-1] + nums[i];
    }

    long long max_sum = -1e18; // a very small number

                    }
                    if (current_sum > max_sum) {
                        max_sum = current_sum;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return max_sum;
}

        }

    // Compute right_decr

    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {

            right_decr[i] = right_decr[i+1] + 1;

    vector<int> right_incr(n, 1);

    }

}

#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;

long long solve(vector<long long> nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    if (n < 4) return 0; // according to problem statement, there is at least one valid subarray, but the input is guaranteed to have at least one.

    // Compute left_incr
    vector<int> left_incr(n, 1);
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (nums[i] > nums[i-1]) {
            left_incr[i] = left_incr[i-1] + 1;
        } else {
            left_incr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute right_decr
    vector<int> right_decr(n, 1);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
        if (nums[i] > nums[i+1]) {
            right_decr[i] = right_decr[i+1] + 1;
        } else {
            right_decr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute right_incr
    vector<int> right_incr(n, 1);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
        if (nums[i] < nums[i+1]) {
            right_incr[i] = right_incr[i+1] + 1;
        } else {
            right_incr[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    // Compute prefix sums
    vector<long long> prefix(n);
    prefix[0] = nums[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        prefix[i] = prefix[i-1] + nums[i];
    }

    long long max_sum = -1e18; // a very small number

    for (int p = 0; p < n; ++p) {
        if (left_incr[p] >= 2 && right_decr[p] >= 2) {
            int q = p + right_decr[p] - 1;
            if (right_incr[q] >= 2) {
                int r = q + right_incr[q] - 1;
                int l = p - left_incr[p] + 1;
                // Check if l is valid (>=0)
                if (l >= 0 && r < n) {
                    long long current_sum;
                    if (l == 0) {
                        current_sum = prefix[r];
                    } else {
                        current_sum = prefix[r] - prefix[l-1];
                    }
                    if (current_sum > max_sum) {
                        max_sum = current_sum;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return max_sum;
}
